Skill: Master UX/UI Principles
Description: Super skill of UX e UI Design integrando Refactoring UI, Laws of UX e Don't Make Me Think. Use for criar ou refatorar interfaces with usabilidade extrema, hierarquia visual impecavel e clareza cognitiva. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Sources - Don't Make Me Think — Steve Krug - Refactoring UI — Steve Schoger & Adam Wathan - Laws of UX — Jon Yablonski
Triggers: ux ui, refactor ui, interface design, usability, design principles, ui design, ux design
Stack: Next.js 15+ App Router; React 19+; TanStack Query; shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4; Monorepo (apps + packages)
Workflow:
- 1. Define hierarchy without colors — just typographic weights, sizes and spacing.
- 2. Aplicar paleta cromatica sobre hierarquia ja estabelecida.
- 3. Validate singular primary CTA, large buttons, and familiar conventions.
- 4. Implementar loading states, errors acionaveis e micro-interactions.
- 5. Auditar accessibility e prevencao of errors in flows criticos.
Output Contract:
- Hierarquia visual documentada by tela.
- Paleta of actions e estados of botao.
- Checklist of loading/errorr/empty states.
- Relatorio of accessibility e prevencao of error.
